name: compute_make_vs_buy
description: Compare total cost of ownership for in-house service delivery versus outsourcing to a vendor. Returns annual savings, per-unit costs, and a recommendation (In-House, Outsource, or Marginal).

serviceName.description: Name of the service being evaluated (e.g., housekeeping, laundry, F&B)

inHouseLabor.description: Annual direct wages for in-house staff

suppliesAnnual.description: Annual direct materials and supplies cost

allocatedOverhead.description: Allocated space, utilities, and overhead costs

internalOversightHours.description: Manager hours per week to oversee vendor

unitCount.description: Number of service units (e.g., rooms, keys)
